## Verification

- [ ] `git diff --check`

## Safety and rights

- [ ] No API keys, credentials, private audio, personal data, or absolute user paths were added
- [ ] I have the right to contribute every new image, voice, character, and other asset
- [ ] Destructive or force options are not enabled by default
